image: a goodbye whispered through clenched teeth
take: Love ended and nobody wants to say it out loud. The silence between them does all the talking, and each line lands like a door clicking shut in a dark hallway.
contradiction: They both know it is over, and neither will say so first.

arc.label: Verse 1
arc.scene: A kitchen at midnight. One voice, one cup of coffee, one chair pulled out for no one.

arc.label: Chorus
arc.scene: A held note that almost breaks, then doesn't. Words swallowed mid sentence.

arc.label: Bridge
arc.scene: The other person is remembered in past tense. Only the room answers back.

arc.label: Outro
arc.scene: Three notes on a piano. Then nothing.

texture: Piano, low strings, a single breath between verses. No drums. Space does most of the work.
